title: The Red Lily — Complete
summaries: "The Red Lily — Complete" by Anatole France is a novel published in 1894. It tells the story of a beautiful French countess trapped in a loveless marriage who becomes entangled with two men—first accepting devotion she doesn't fully return, then discovering true passion with a sculptor. When her past liaison surfaces, jealousy threatens to destroy the love she cherishes most. Set against the backdrop of Florence and Paris, this romantic drama explores the complications of love, truth, and forgiveness. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
